calendar.matters:
Petition Regarding (1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; And (2) Suspension, Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Off Calendar

Petition Regarding (1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; And (2) Suspension, Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Continued To Dec-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elijah Keyes for Janice Santiago and Judy Nishi.
Port Parker appeared by telephone for Carolyn Sing.

Mr. Keyes stated that they have signed a settlement agreement, that he will be filing a withdrawal of the petitions and that they will be filing a petition for approval of the settlement agreement. The Petition for Breach of Fiduciary Duty. etc. and Petition for Instructions are continued to December 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Continued To Dec-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Regarding (1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; And (2) Suspension, Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Continued To Nov-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marjan Hajimirzaee appeared by telephone for Carolyn Sing (Trustee).
Elijah Keyes for Judith Nishi and Janice Santiago.

Mr. Keyes stated that they mediated on July 13th, that they came to a settlement of the majority of the case, that the parties are working through the agreement and apologized for not appearing at the last hearing. Mr. Keyes also stated that a final agreement has not been prepared, that opposing Counsel filed a status report on Friday, that both parties have withdrawn some of their claims and requested a 90-day continuance. Ms. Hajimirzaee also requested 90-days to accomplish settlement. The Petition Regarding Breach of Fiduciary Duty, etc. and the Petition for Instructions are continued to November 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Continued To Nov-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Regarding (1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; And (2) Suspension, Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Continued To Aug-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to both Attorneys to appear on August 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. The Petition for Instructions and the Petition for Suspension and Removal of Trustee, etc. are also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Continued To Aug-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Regarding (1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; And (2) Suspension, Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-12-2017 Continued To Aug-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Port Parker appeared for all parties.

Mr. Parker stated that he was appearing for all parties, and that they have agreed upon Martin Quinn of JAMS as mediator, and the mediation will be scheduled for the middle of July. The parties are available on several dates, and are waiting to hear back from the mediator as to the date he selects. A 60 day continuance of the hearing was requested on behalf of all parties. The matter was continued to August 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-12-2017 Continued To Aug-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Regarding (1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; And (2) Suspension, Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Continued To Jun-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Continued To Jun-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Regarding (1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; And (2) Suspension, Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Mar-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Mar-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Regarding (1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; And (2) Suspension, Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-10-2017 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Roscoe (appeared by telephone) and Regia Araujo for Carolyn Sing (Trustee/Respondent).
Elijah Keyes for Judy Nishi (Objector/Cross-Petitioner).

Ms. Araujo that the State Assessor has been contacted and communication is working, that the tax liability is down from twelve years to eight years, that the main contention is that they want distribution outright and right now, and that there are no grounds for removal. Mr. Keyes raised the issue of penalties and interest and whether the Trustee is able to limit that kind of liability, stated that his Client is still seeking removal and surcharge, and clarified that each Beneficiary received $250,000.00 not $500,000.00. Mr. Keyes also stated that an accounting has been filed, but that he has not had the chance to review it and respond. Mr. Roscoe suggested that a reasonable time to work out the tax issue is four to five months down the line to show what the Trustee has done. The Petition Regarding Breach of Fiduciary Duty, etc. and the Petition for Instructions are continued to March 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Prior to that date the Court would like to see amended petitions to reflect what is still at issue, or if a different relief is appropriate. The Court also asked if the parties are interested in pro bono mediation and stated that it would like to see parties talk and see how the matter can be resolved.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jan-10-2017 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Continued To Jan-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Weiner for (petitioner) Carolyn Kim Sing. William Roscoe (via court call) for (petitioner) Carolyn Kim Sing. Elijah Keyes for (respondents) Janice Santiago & Julie Nishi.

The Court stated that there were objections filed yesterday as well as a new petition by a beneficiary to remove the trustee and that it will continue this petition to be heard at the same time. Ms. Weiner stated that the petitions are unrelated, that this petition was filed in October but objections were just filed yesterday, that if the parties cannot get instructions there will be tax issues that will impact the trust and the beneficiaries and asks that the matters be handled separately. The Court stated that the trust law provides for what you are requesting in the Petition for Instructions and continued the petition to January 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
